titles.title: There Is None Like Unto You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is none Like unto you my Father Holy and righteous in all There is none to compare With Your majesty With my voice Lord Your Name I will call

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I worship You Lord, I worship You Precious Lamb Jesus Lord, Son of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I worship You Lord, I worship You For You, You alone are God
